body: Reached out to Angela this morning. She can do January 17 - 7:30 AM slot for the interview segment. Confirming talking points and doing a phone check Thursday at 6 PM.
I'll get her a station access pass for the Beale Street studio. She needs to be there by 6:45 AM for sound check. Let me know if the talking points change.
Script is drafted in rough. Opening line: 'Before the world turns up its volume, there is a moment - still waters.' Working on the transition into the interview intro.
Sent read copy to Covenant Insurance Group. Waiting on Mitchell's Flowers - called the shop, they want the copy to mention the Midtown location specifically. Revising.
Covenant approved. Mitchell's copy revision approved this morning. Both January 17 reads are cleared. Still need to send December invoice to Mitchell's - attaching to this thread.
TJ confirmed: pre-recorded file should be WAV, 44.1kHz, delivered by January 22 noon. He needs 30 minutes of content to fit the full 7-9 AM slot with music fill.
Bluff City Auto Care wants a 3-month renewal through March. New copy mentioning the Cordova location is ready. Sending them the draft for sign-off.
December 6 workshop documentation is pulled. Certificate of completion attached to the APC portal submission. Submitting the 8 hours now - should clear within 5 business days.

Both residents confirmed for January 13 at 2 PM in my office after rounds. Mid-year learning contracts reviewed. One resident is struggling with boundary-setting in ICU family conferences - addressing in this session.
Session notes submitted. Both residents on track. Recommend 2-hour additional family conference shadowing for the one resident - scheduled for January 27.
Confirmed with Angela - January 14 at 10 AM at Cafe Eclectic. That's 3 peer review hours. Will bring the case review framework we used at the APC workshop.
Fellowship hall is available October 3. Church secretary confirmed the booking. I'll post the date to the bulletin by Sunday.

October 3 is perfect - that gives us plenty of runway to prep. Updating the project target date to match. Sandra Coles is already asking about bringing nursing students. Let's lock the volunteer count next week.

Called Sandra Coles. Bluff City Community College nursing students can provide 6 screeners for the October 3 date. She'll brief them on station protocols. I'll send her the event details by end of week.
